div.p: API Layer INSERT + SELECT only No UPDATE / No DELETE
D1 Event Log Append-only Hash-chained SOURCE OF TRUTH
Post-Write Sync Mirrors each event into Notion
Integrity Verifier Cron every 5 min D1 vs Notion check
Notion Mirror Database Copy of every event Philip + Claude read here
Discrepancy Alert Auto-created if D1 != Notion Visible immediately
Watcher Script Polls API every 30s systemd auto-restart
